misses.name: Attio
misses.note: Attio supports API key (primary self-serve method, generated in Workspace Settings > Developers) AND OAuth2 for published apps. Claim only lists OAuth, missing the API key path most self-serve devs actually use.

misses.name: Attio
misses.claimed: Wrapped by Composio as 99 agent-callable tools (managed via Composio's toolkit catalog for 'attio')

misses.name: Attio
misses.note: attio.com is the marketing homepage. Real docs are at developers.attio.com / docs.attio.com.
